name: Mango Capital, Inc.
summary: Mango Capital, Inc. operates as a real estate holding company specializes in acquiring undervalued land and real estate properties in the United States. Mango Capital, Inc. was formerly known as MangoSoft, Inc. and changed its name to Mango Capital, Inc. in January 2011. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Far Hills, New Jersey.
